name: The 10 Minute German Sweet Chocolate Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chocolate and 2 tablespoons of milk over low heat, stirring until melted. Beat in sugar into the cream cheese; add the remaining milk and chocolate mixture, beating until smooth.
2. Fold the COOL WHIP (R) topping into the chocolate mixture and blend until smooth.
3. Spoon the mixture into the crust and freeze for about 4 hours. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired.
